query: I'm using @luzmo/react-embed in our Next.js admin. I dropped a LuzmoVizItemComponent into a sidebar and it just shows up as nothing — zero height, no errors in the console. Container is a flex child if that matters.
What's the right way to build a Flex bar chart in our Vue 3 app for the sales team?
We've got like 12 Flex charts on the same page and a few of them are showing the wrong data — feels like they're swapping. Could that be a contextId thing?
Backend just gave me { id, token } from createAuthorization. How do I actually pass these to luzmo-embed-dashboard in vanilla JS?
Trying to put a Luzmo dashboard inside a fixed-height drawer (600px) but it overflows. Best way to deal with the variable-height behavior?
Getting 'Invalid label' errors when I configure a Flex donut chart in Angular — my measure has aggregationFunc set and everything.
Dark theme on our Flex charts looks half-broken — the charts go dark but the page around them stays white. Same in our React app and the storybook isolation.
Localhost Flex chart keeps reconnecting to /realtime and eventually says Query failed. apiHost points at api.luzmo.com.
Need to add a datetime hierarchy dimension to a line chart at month granularity, what does the slot config look like for that?
On mobile our embedded dashboard looks crammed and only uses ~40% of the screen width. What screen modes do I need to configure?
I'm using <cumul-dashboard> in our React app — it's not loading anymore after we upgraded the SDK. Did the tag name change?
We need to set up multi-tenant data isolation for our SaaS users — every customer should only see their own org's rows. Where do I start?
How do I create a Plugin connector for a proprietary REST data source so Luzmo can query it?
Best practice for storing LUZMO_API_KEY in our Node backend deployed on Fly.io?
Want to give our designers a luzmo-iq-embed-chat sidebar so they can ask questions about the marketing dataset.
Need a Python script that searches for all dashboards created before 2024 and deletes them after confirmation.
How do I let my power users edit charts inside the embedded dashboard? Looking at ACK from @luzmo/analytics-components-kit.
Trying to design a custom theme that matches our brand palette (#0F172A primary, Inter font). Theme API or token override?
Help me figure out the createAccount properties for a Snowflake connection — host, warehouse, role…
Refactoring our backend: should I use @luzmo/nodejs-sdk or call /securable endpoints directly with fetch?
IQ keeps picking the wrong dataset when our PM asks 'revenue last quarter'. Token has all 47 datasets attached — how do I improve accuracy?
